blockedAssertions.blockedBy: Blocked because the native Tauri window remained non-interactive in this rerun: OCR-mapped CGEvent clicks on visible controls produced no UI change, `AXFrontmost` stayed false, and the accessibility tree never exposed actionable child elements.
